---
name: create-copilot-instructions
description: Use this prompt to generate instructions for using GitHub Copilot effectively in various coding scenarios.
agent: Instructions Generator
---

Take the information below and generate a [NAME].instructions.md file in .github/instructions directory. Generate an appropriate [NAME] placeholder based on generated content. Make sure the instructions are concise, clear, and not too long. If no information is provided below, prompt the user to give the necessary details about layer of architecture or coding standard to document. The .md file should have frontmatter with a description property that informs copilot of when to use this set of instructions.
